caption: A man with glasses and a tall, greyish-white stylized wig is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with a small decorative bow at the collar. He is wearing over-ear headphones and speaking into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background is filled with several framed photographs and images on the wall, along with a white folder and clothing items. An on-screen logo and text appear in the lower-left and center-left areas of the screen, reading "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while continuing to talk, though his overall posture and the surrounding environment remain stationary.
